records.primaryText:
Max Domi underwent offseason surgery to address an issue he played through this past season. Due to complications arising from the procedure, Domi will be out indefinitely, Maple Leafs announce. 
He'll be reevaluated at the start of training camp.

records.enrichedText:
Max Domi underwent offseason surgery to address an issue he played through this past season. Due to complications arising from the procedure, Domi will be out indefinitely, Maple Leafs announce. 
He'll be reevaluated at the start of training camp.

records.primaryText:
Told goaltender Ivan Fedotov has left AHL Cleveland and returned to Russia with an undisclosed injury.
He had moments with @monstershockey this season, but lost his way and lost the job to Zach Sawchenko.
Fedotov, 29, was 23-16-6 with an .887 save %. He’s UFA on July 1.#CBJ
